The '''Nord''' were a dwarf-like, three-[[Foot/Legends|foot]]-tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Nordra]]. They were a hardy race that had learned to live under constant threat of danger from the harsh environment of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Way of the Yrashu}} {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (audiobook)}}
